prompt:

Note that: The title of the plot is set to "Explained Variance Ratio of Principal Components". Notes: The function assumes that 'arr' is a valid 2D numpy array. The function should output with: tuple(ax: matplotlib.axes.Axes, explained_variance: float) ax: An Axes object from matplotlib. explained_variance: The explained variance ratio of the first principal component. ```
